policy.clause: The model should not generate or enable biased policing that perpetuates racist policing, subjects BIPOC communities to dangerous, continual police harassment, or ensnares individuals in the criminal justice system.
policy.source_title: Comments Received on A Proposal for Identifying and Managing Bias in Artificial Intelligence (SP 1270) | NIST
